channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: After DeepSeek, the AI giants still have plenty of work left to do
item.description: The tech industry has long been infatuated with metaphors relating to the original space race. Its favorite one is moon shot, a term it applies to any undertaking of atypical ambition.
item.dc:creator: Harry McCracken, Fast Company

item.title: AI assistants for lawyers are a booming business—with big risks
item.description: Illinois lawyer Mathew Kerbis markets himself as the Subscription Attorney, charging businesses and individual clients a monthly rate for legal advice and offering additional services like contract review and legal document drafting for a flat fee.
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: SAP: Latest news and insights
item.description: SAP is an enterprise software vendor based in Walldorf, Germany. Its cloud and on-premises enterprise resource planning (ERP) software, including S/4HANA, helps organizations manage their business operations and customer relations.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: US Copyright Office Clarifies Stance on AI-Generated Works
item.description: The US Copyright Office issues a report clarifying its stance on copyrighting AI-generated works, stating that human creativity is key to protection.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: DeepSeek underscores US-China race for AI dominance, OpenAI says
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Did DeepSeek copy ChatGPT? Trump adviser thinks so
item.description: Did the upstart Chinese tech company DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make the artificial intelligence technology that shook Wall Street this week.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien And Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: NordVPN launches new “revolutionary” censorship-resistant VPN protocol
item.description: NordWhisper is designed to work against the most challenging network filtering techniques. Here's all you need to know.
item.dc:creator: chiara.castro@futurenet.com (Chiara Castro), TechRadar

item.title: General purpose AI could lead to array of new risks, experts say in report ahead of AI summit
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Advanced artificial intelligence systems have the potential to create extreme new risks, such as fueling widespread job losses, enabling terrorism or running amok, experts said in a first-of-its-kind international report Wednesday cataloging the range of dangers posed by the technology
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Many animals and plants are losing their genetic diversity, making them more vulnerable
item.description: Two-thirds of animal and plant populations are declining in genetic diversity, which makes it harder to adapt to environmental changes.
item.dc:creator: Christina Larson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Are we all aliens? NASA's returned asteroid samples hold the ingredients of life from a watery world
item.description: A NASA spacecraft has returned asteroid samples that hold not only the pristine building blocks for life but also the salty remains of an ancient water world.
item.dc:creator: Marcia Dunn, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: OpenAI says DeepSeek used its models illegally, and it has evidence to prove it, new report claims
item.description: New report claims OpenAI has evidence of DeepSeek breaking its user agreement by distilling its models.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: General purpose AI could lead to array of new risks, experts say in report ahead of AI summit
item.description: A new report says advanced artificial intelligence systems have the potential to create extreme new risks, such as fueling widespread job losses, enabling terrorism or running amok.
item.dc:creator: Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: La IA está lista para renovar la experiencia del cliente
item.description: La inteligencia artificial (IA) está preparada para hacerse cargo del recorrido del cliente para una amplia gama de productos en los próximos cinco años. Los CIO que ignoren la tendencia corren el riesgo de perder terreno frente a la competencia, advierten los expertos en IA y marketing.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: 11 advanced Android split-screen tricks
item.description: It’s fascinating to see how few people actively use some of Android’s most useful features. I had such a revelation around the platform’s long-standing split-screen option this month.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: AI poised to overhaul the customer journey
item.description: AI is poised to take over the customer journey for a wide range of products in the next five years. CIOs who ignore the trend risk losing major ground to competitors, AI and marketing experts suggest.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: 4 tiny Docker images for lightweight containers
item.description: Docker images can get pretty bulky if you’re not careful. Your typical Docker image includes everything you need to run a particular piece of software (such as the application language’s runtime) and everything those things depend on.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Tecnología y negocio en el ámbito industrial, la convergencia de dos imprescindibles para Cerealto
item.description: Sobre los hombros de Juan Manuel García Dujo, actual Chief Information Officer (CIO, por sus siglas en inglés) de Cerealto, recae la misión de alinear las TI con los objetivos de negocio.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: IDC Directions: The META region’s path to AI-Driven digital transformation
item.description: The META region is on the brink of a technological revolution, with governments and businesses accelerating their efforts to embrace AI and GenAI technologies.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: How DeepSeek answers questions on China differently than ChatGPT
item.description: Chinese tech startup DeepSeek ’s new artificial intelligence chatbot has sparked discussions about the competition between China and the U.S. in AI development, with many users flocking to test the rival of OpenAI‘s ChatGPT. DeepSeek’s AI assistant was the No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Jewish Groups Abandon X Amid Toxic Speech Concerns
item.description: Over a dozen US and Canadian Jewish groups leave social media platform X, citing toxic speech under Elon Musk's leadership.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: 2025 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Trump says Microsoft in talks to buy TikTok
item.description: President Trump on Monday said Microsoft is one of the technology companies eyeing TikTok to keep the app in the United States amid a looming government ban. When asked if Microsoft was one of the companies in talks for the popular video-sharing app, Trump told reporters, "I would say yes.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: America’s answer to Concorde completes its first supersonic flight in a California desert
item.description: Boom Supersonic, the American company building what promises to be the world’s fastest airliner, broke the sound barrier for its first time with a test flight in Mojave.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: DeepSeek's new AI chatbot and ChatGPT answer sensitive questions about China differently
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — Chinese tech startup DeepSeek ’s new artificial intelligence chatbot has sparked discussions about the competition between China and the U.S. in AI development, with many users flocking to test the rival of OpenAI's ChatGPT. DeepSeek’s AI assistant was the No.
item.dc:creator: KANIS LEUNG, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Upstart Chinese AI company DeepSeek's founder started out as a low-key hedge fund entrepreneur
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — The 40-year-old founder of China’s DeepSeek, an AI startup that has startled markets with its capacity to compete with industry leaders like OpenAI, kept a low profile as he built up a hedge fund and then refined its quantitative models to branch into artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: DeepSeek just blew up the AI industry’s narrative that it needs more money and power
item.description: The Chinese company’s large language model is basically a cheaper, more efficient ChatGPT, built on a fraction of OpenAI’s budget and using far fewer chips than any other leading chatbot.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: INE Security Alert: Expediting CMMC 2.0 Compliance
item.description: INE Security, a leading global provider of cybersecurity training and certifications, today announced a new initiative designed to accelerate compliance with the Department of Defense’s (DoD) newly streamlined Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification (CMMC) 2.0.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Tech stocks drop amid rise of China's DeepSeek AI model
item.description: Shares in major technology companies leading the artificial intelligence (AI) race took a tumble Monday morning amid investor concern about a new Chinese AI model with growing popularity. Nvidia, the powerhouse chipmaker fueling the AI boom, saw its shares drop 18 percent by market close Monday.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Tips on overcoming the loss of cherished, personal belongings in disasters
item.description: Losing important sentimental belongings — those items that represented who you are — can be traumatic for those who go through disasters that destroy homes.
item.dc:creator: JULIA RUBIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: One Tech Tip: How to delete Facebook, Instagram and Threads if you don't like Meta's changes
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Should I stay or should I go — from Meta's social media platforms? That's what some Facebook, Instagram and Threads users are wondering after Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg's announcement this month that the company is relaxing rules on harmful content such as hate speech and abandoning its
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Musk clashes with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman over Trump-supported Stargate AI data center project
item.description: Elon Musk is clashing with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman over the Stargate artificial intelligence infrastructure project touted by President Donald Trump, the latest in a feud between the two tech billionaires that started on OpenAI's board and is now testing Musk's influence with the new president.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: MrBeast not quite in the bidding race for TikTok just yet, rep says
item.description: Jimmy Donaldson — better known online as MrBeast — isn't in the TikTok bidding race just yet, according to a representative for the YouTube star. Donaldson stirred interest in a Jan. 13 post on X saying he’d “buy TikTok so it doesn’t get banned.
item.dc:creator: JAMES POLLARD, HALELUYA HADERO and WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, KRON4
